title: ferray-fft: plan cache uses Mutex — contention on concurrent FFTs of different sizes
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

The global plan cache in plan.rs uses a single Mutex<PlanCache>. When multiple threads call FFTs of different sizes concurrently, they contend on this mutex to look up or create plans. NumPy doesn't have this issue because pocketfft doesn't cache plans globally (each call creates/reuses internally). Options: (1) use a concurrent HashMap (dashmap), (2) use a RwLock (reads don't block each other), (3) use thread-local caches, (4) shard the cache by size modulo N. RwLock is the simplest improvement since cache hits (the common case) would be non-blocking.
